svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="夜间Loop五阶段" id="nightly"> <mxGraphModel dx="-589" dy="-166" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="夜间 AI Loop: 五阶段流转" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="410" x="380" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="nightly-test.sh · 每天 00:00 · 自管理 daemon · 失败全程飞书告警" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="530" x="320" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="Phase 0
保存现场

stash 未提交改动
记下当前分支名" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="50" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="Phase 1
同步 dev

fetch + checkout dev
reset --hard origin/dev" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="260" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="Phase 2
8 步全量测试

后端单测 ∥ 前端单测
→ 后端 IT → 运营单测
→ 起后端 → 运营 E2E
→ H5 E2E → 小程序编译" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="200" x="470" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diamond" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="测试结果?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="720" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pass" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;dashed=1;" value="PASS

飞书通知通过
→ Phase 4 恢复现场" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="900" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fail" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="FAIL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="110" x="730" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="Phase 3a · Agent 修复

claude -p 切 fix/nightly-xxx 分支
分析日志 → 改代码 → push

约束: 不改测试断言 · 不强行改
不确定的根因输出说明" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="500" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="Phase 3b · 独立验证

切 fix 分支跑完整测试套件
(同一套, 非自己判自己)

全过 → 提 MR(不合并)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="260" x="200" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;dashed=1;" value="不过 →
删 fix 分支
飞书叫人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="820" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="Phase 4 · 恢复现场

切回原分支 → pop stash
开发者第二天打开电脑, 工作区和昨晚一模一样" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="540" x="260" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e01" edge="1" parent="1" source="p0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="p1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="p2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2d" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="diamond"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edp" edge="1" parent="1" source="diamond" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" target="pass"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edf" edge="1" parent="1" source="diamond" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;endArrow=classic;" target="p3a"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ab" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="p3b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ac" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" target="p3c"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_b4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3b" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="p4"> <mxGeometry relative="1"
